title: sphyrospermum sodiroi
intro: Sphyrospermum sodiroi, also known as Sodiro's sphyrospermum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is a medicinal plant used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Sphyrospermum sodiroi is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
